hero.title: Master Vue.js
hero.description: Learn to build modern, reactive, and scalable web applications using Vue.js with real-world examples and projects.

vue basics.description: Learn Vue fundamentals including setup, templates, reactivity, and core concepts.

directives.description: Understand built-in directives like v-if, v-for, v-model, and custom directives.

components.description: Build reusable UI components using props, events, slots, and lifecycle hooks.

composition api.description: Master Vue 3 Composition API including setup(), ref, reactive, computed, and watch.

routing.description: Handle navigation and routing using Vue Router with dynamic routes and guards.

state management.description: Manage global state efficiently using Pinia and reactive patterns.

forms & api.description: Work with forms, validations, and API calls using Axios or Fetch.

advanced vue.description: Explore advanced concepts like Teleport, Suspense, performance optimization, and best practices.

seo.title: About This Vue.js Tutorial Series
seo.description: Vue.js is a progressive JavaScript framework used to build modern, reactive user interfaces. In this tutorial series, you will learn Vue.js from scratch, including components, directives, Composition API, routing, state management, and real-world application development.
